description_long: This sculpture depicts a powerful tiger standing atop a rugged rock formation, its body poised as if surveying its territory. The tiger's mouth is open, revealing sharp teeth, and its facial expression conveys intensity and alertness. The stonework is detailed, with visible fur texture on the tiger and a rough, naturalistic surface on the rocks. The sculpture is mounted on a wooden pallet, suggesting it is in transit or awaiting installation. The coloration is primarily a mix of gray and off-white, with some yellowish and brownish tones accentuating the stone's weathered appearance. The overall impression is one of strength and dominance, capturing the essence of the tiger in a lifelike manner.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a tiger standing on a rocky base, with lifelike fur texture and an expressive, open-mouthed face. The piece is primarily gray and off-white, with hints of yellow and brown.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tiger's muscular body and one paw raised on the rock, highlighting the fur texture and the layered stone base.
description_view_1: Frontal view emphasizing the tiger's fierce facial expression, open mouth, and both front paws gripping the rock formation.
description_view_2: Angled view from the opposite side, revealing the tiger's head in profile and the full extent of the rocky base.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tiger's back and tail, with less detail visible on the face and more emphasis on the body posture.
attribute_subject_matter: animal, specifically a tiger on a rocky base
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears to be on a wooden pallet, possibly in storage or transit.
